title: iris cengialti subsp. veneta
intro: Iris cengialti subsp. veneta, also known as the Italian iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the iris family (Iridaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Iris cengialti subsp. veneta include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reduced inflammation and improved skin health. Herbal preparations of Iris cengialti subsp. veneta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
